title: Dressrosa's Forgotten Pain
description: Pages 6–10 focus on dressrosa's forgotten pain, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Dressrosa Citizens, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as dressrosa's past and the suffering of the Riku family deepen the stakes behind Rebecca, the toys, and Doflamingo's rule.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You're right, Eliz- Abello- Sama!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: In our country's past, dress- Rosa was surely,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: A great benefit- for...

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: But now, the name King Riku...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Shut your mouth, Dagama!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Those who don't know the truth of the incident 10 years ago...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Those who know nothing of the tragedy of that day will not speak to the character of our King!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: tank! It's fine. At this point...

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: King Riku, I too... was a soldier in your army.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: me too.

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: I, as well....!! King Riku!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Uwahh!! What the!!? The toys are moving!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I thought they were all dead and broken!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: These former soldiers of dress- Rosa...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Even some of the toys are bowing down...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What's going on here....!?

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: I thought this King Riku was hated by his coun- trymen...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: with as large a pitfall as this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The basement is bound to hold other secrets.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Under- stood. Continue your lives- tigation.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Ameness experience

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Nuhh!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Ohh!? Wha-wha- what's going on now!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Big bro!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Owahhhh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: SA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: behehe, right, right.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: It's over, so no need to worry anymore.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: "Cause humans no harm".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: "Obey all orders from the family".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Follow those rules. And don't forget them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: You high-ters are all "power" types.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Just go straight and exit through that door...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: and head to the facto- Ry and the Port!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Work hard, now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: What now!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: I can't control my own body!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: I can't disobey his orders!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Just what...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Has happened to me!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Colossum: Prisoner Gladiator lodging.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: GO...!!! Rebecca !!!

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: O!! Nevermind cabbage for now, Rebecca! Show Yem how it's done!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Hmmm!!? Now that I think about it, it's kind of hard to see from here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: I'm gonna find a Clos- er place to cheer from!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: A....Ahh.

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: But wait. I thought this country looked like a lot of fun, and everyone seemed happy, but...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: Looking at you guys... that's not really true, huh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: "What you saw was the bright and shining world of the "winners",

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: Dofla- Mingo has split us into sub- servant winners...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: And rebellious losers....!! Just like with the world govern- ment, really...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: The losers who stray from the system are treated like garbage.

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: And if garbage remains hidden in the shadows... then the country retains its image.

summary: Dressrosa's Forgotten Pain focuses on Unknown person #1, Dressrosa Citizens, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as dressrosa's past and the suffering of the Riku family deepen the stakes behind Rebecca, the toys, and Doflamingo's rule.
